info.name: Medical Offer API
info.description: API Collection for Medical Offer application, including Authentication.

item.name: Authentication

request.description:
Request an OTP for a given phone number. Rate limited to 6 requests per minute per IP.

**Payload:**
- `phone`: The user's phone number.

**Common Status Codes:**
- `200 OK`: OTP sent successfully.
- `422 Unprocessable Entity`: Invalid phone number format.
- `429 Too Many Requests`: Rate limit exceeded.

response.name: Success Response
Validation Error
Rate Limit Exceeded

request.description:
Verify the OTP provided by the user.

**Behavior:**
- If registered: Returns a Bearer token.
- If NOT registered: Returns `registered: false`, indicating the user must complete registration.

**Payload:**
- `phone`: The user's phone number.
- `otp`: The 6-digit code sent via SMS.

response.name: Success (User Registered)
Success (New User - Not Registered)
Invalid OTP

request.description: Register a new user after successful OTP verification.

response.name: Registration Successful
Validation Error (Missing Fields)

item.description: Endpoints related to user authentication and OTP verification.

item.name: Home

header.description: Language for the response (ar or en)

request.description:
Main dashboard endpoint. Returns localized content for the mobile app home screen.

**Features:**
- **Caching:** Responses are cached for 30 minutes to ensure peak performance.
- **Localization:** Titles and labels respond to `Accept-Language` header.
- **Guest Support:** Returns general data if no token is provided.

response.name: Home Data Success (Arabic)
Home Data Success (English)
Home Data Success (Authenticated User)

item.description: Endpoints for retrieving localized home page dashboard content.

header.description: Language for the response (ar or en)

request.description:
Retrieve all active categories with translations.

**Features:**
- Returns only active categories
- Includes translated names based on Accept-Language header
- Returns category icons

response.name: Categories Success (Arabic)
Categories Success (English)

header.description: Language for the response (ar or en)

request.description:
Retrieve paginated list of providers.

**Features:**
- Paginated response (15 items per page)
- Includes translations, country, and branches
- Supports standard pagination parameters (page, per_page)

response.name: Providers Success

header.description: Language for the response (ar or en)

request.description:
Retrieve detailed information about a specific provider.

**Includes:**
- Provider translations
- Country information
- All branches
- Reviews and ratings

response.name: Provider Details Success
Provider Not Found

header.description: Language for the response (ar or en)

request.description:
Retrieve paginated list of offers.

**Features:**
- Paginated response (15 items per page)
- Includes translations, images, and provider information
- Supports standard pagination parameters

response.name: Offers Success

header.description: Language for the response (ar or en)

request.description:
Retrieve detailed information about a specific offer.

**Includes:**
- Offer translations
- All images
- Provider information
- Reviews and ratings

response.name: Offer Details Success
Offer Not Found

item.description: Endpoints for managing countries and cities.

header.description: Language for the response (ar or en)

request.description:
Retrieve user's favorite offers and providers.

**Requires:** Bearer token authentication

response.name: Favorites Success
No Authentication

request.description:
Toggle an offer or provider as favorite.

**Parameters:**
- `offer_id` (optional): ID of the offer to toggle
- `provider_id` (optional): ID of the provider to toggle

**Note:** Either offer_id or provider_id must be provided, but not both.

response.name: Add to Favorites Success
Remove from Favorites Success
Add Provider to Favorites
Validation Error
No Authentication

header.description: Language for the response (ar or en)

request.description:
Retrieve active sections for organizing home page content.

**Features:**
- Returns sections with their associated providers and offers
- Used for organizing content on the home page
- Includes translated section names

response.name: Sections Success (Arabic)
Sections Success (English)
